heading: Definitions
label: 149 Definitions
notes: Amendments1960—Subsec. (b). substituted “means the fifty States and the District of Columbia” for “means continental United States, including Alaska”.Pub. L. 86–6241959—Subsec. (b). inserted “, including Alaska” after “continental United States”.Pub. L. 86–70
amendments: Amendments1960—Subsec. (b). substituted “means the fifty States and the District of Columbia” for “means continental United States, including Alaska”.Pub. L. 86–6241959—Subsec. (b). inserted “, including Alaska” after “continental United States”.Pub. L. 86–70

children.label: a
children.text: The term “person” means an individual, partnership, association, or corporation.

children.label: b
children.text: The term “United States” means the fifty States and the District of Columbia.
